title: hemionitis angulosa
intro: Hemionitis angulosa, also known as the angled hemionitis or angled fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hemionitis angulosa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Hemionitis angulosa can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
